case_title: RENER, RUSSELL vs. JINKS, LYNDELL et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF RENER, RUSSELL

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-06-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE POS OR APPLICATION TO HAVE CASE DESIGNATED AS UM. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY IRA A FREYDKIS. HEARING SET FOR FEB-24-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DECLARATION IN RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-24-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, OR TO OBTAIN UM DESIGNATION. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY IRA A FREYDKIS. HEARING SET FOR MAR-31-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-31-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $300.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAR-31-1999, TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE; OBTAIN ANSWER AND OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT; OSC AND SANCTIONS TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY IRA A FREYDKIS WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-15-1999 CONTINUED FROM MAR-31-1999 TO MAY-05-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF RENER, RUSSELL
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RENER, RUSSELL AS TO DEFENDANT JINKS, LYNDELL DAVIS, PRINCE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-20-1998 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-21-1998 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-02-1998
